overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning on a busy street with colorful LED walls and elevated highways, passing through a dark underpass, following a curved ramp, and ending in a covered pedestrian arcade with digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban street with elevated highway and colorful LED walls

events.description: LED retaining wall cycles through green, pink, and yellow colors
futuristic white sedan drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk next to a busy road with colorful LED walls

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car driving along the street

entered.detail: multi-level concrete highway overpass with yellow safety barriers
tall wall with shifting neon colors including green, pink, and yellow
tall glass and steel cyberpunk towers with reflective surfaces
tropical trees lining the street in planters

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bright, open city street beneath an elevated highway. To the right, a tall LED wall cycles through vivid neon colors while futuristic vehicles pass by. Tall glass skyscrapers rise in the distance against a clear afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway underpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: entering the shadow of the highway underpass, significantly darker lighting
red vehicle passes through the underpass from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass beneath the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: red car driving through the underpass tunnel

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling and support structure of the highway underpass

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dark concrete underpass beneath the elevated highway. The lighting drops significantly to shadow, with only the road ahead illuminated. Vehicles occasionally pass through the tunnel-like space.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pedestrian ramp alongside elevated highway

events.description: exiting the underpass back into direct sunlight
following the curved pathway as it bends to the right alongside the road

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved ramp that follows the highway structure, moving from shadow back into sunlight

entered.detail: yellow-marked curved walkway with integrated edge lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into sunlight, following a curved pedestrian ramp that runs parallel to the elevated highway. The path bends to the right, with the massive highway structure now running alongside on the left and futuristic towers visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with landscaped areas approaching covered arcade

events.description: leaving the vehicle road and entering a pedestrian-only plaza area
encountering groups of pedestrians walking in various directions

agents.ego_description: walking through a landscaped pedestrian plaza with other people, approaching a covered walkway entrance

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking toward the camera
group of people walking away toward the covered entrance

entered.detail: tiled pedestrian path with yellow and gray geometric patterns
raised concrete planters with trees and grass areas
dark tunnel-like entrance to covered walkway with neon lighting visible inside

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the roadside to a landscaped pedestrian plaza with tiled walkways and raised planters. Other pedestrians are walking in various directions as the camera approaches a dark, neon-lit entrance to a covered arcade ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital billboards and shops

events.description: entering the fully covered pedestrian arcade with overhead roof structure
passing large digital advertisement screens displaying colorful graphics

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade, passing by shops and digital signage with other pedestrians nearby

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: dark metal ceiling structure with geometric panels and skylights
large glowing screens displaying colorful advertisements and graphics
store entrances with glass doors and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Inside a covered commercial arcade with a high metal ceiling and neon lighting. Large digital billboards display colorful advertisements on the walls ahead, while shop fronts line the sides. The space is populated with pedestrians walking through the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open city street through a dark underpass and into a neon-lit commercial arcade. It begins beneath an elevated highway where a tall LED wall cycles through vivid colors and glass skyscrapers rise against a clear afternoon sky. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts abruptly into the deep shadows of a concrete underpass, where only the road ahead remains illuminated between passing vehicles. The view then emerges back into the sunlight, following a curved pedestrian ramp that bends to the right alongside the massive highway structure before transitioning into a landscaped plaza with tiled walkways and raised planters. Finally, the camera enters a covered arcade under a high metal ceiling, where the environment transforms into a corridor of shop fronts and large digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements.
